mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_PAY ( pay_id, pay_amount, pay_method, pay_date, pay_status ) VALUES ( #{payId}, #{payAmount}, #{payMethod}, SYSDATE, #{payStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PAY_ID AS payId, p.PAY_AMOUNT AS payAmount, p.PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, TO_CHAR(p.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, p.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus FROM UB_PAY p JOIN UB_MATCHING m ON p.PAY_ID = m.PAY_ID WHERE m.MENTEE_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY p.PAY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PAY_ID as payId, P.PAY_AMOUNT as payAmount, P.PAY_METHOD as payMethod, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as payDate, P.PAY_STATUS as payStatus, M.MEMBER_NAME as memberName, F.FILE_NAME as fileName, MT.MENTORING_GOAL as purpose FROM UB_PAY P JOIN UB_MATCHING MAT ON P.PAY_ID = MAT.PAY_ID JOIN UB_MEMBER M ON MAT.MENTOR_NUMBER = M.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_FILE F ON M.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_MENTORING MT ON M.MEMBER_NUMBER = MT.MENTOR_NUMBER WHERE MAT.MENTEE_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY P.PAY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT P.PAY_ID as payId, P.PAY_AMOUNT as payAmount, P.PAY_METHOD as payMethod, TO_CHAR(P.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as payDate, P.PAY_STATUS as payStatus, F.FILE_NAME as fileName FROM UB_PAY P JOIN UB_MATCHING MAT ON P.PAY_ID = MAT.PAY_ID JOIN UB_MEMBER M ON MAT.MENTOR_NUMBER = M.MEMBER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN UB_FILE F ON M.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER WHERE P.PAY_ID = #{payId}
